ComponentType: Single-Cell Lithium-Ion Battery Linear Charger IC
Description: The MCP73831T-2ATI/OT is a fully integrated constant-current/constant-voltage linear charger for single-cell lithium-ion batteries. Designed for USB power compliance, it requires minimal external components. It features programmable charge current up to 500mA, thermal regulation, automatic charge termination (C/10), and a preset 4.2V charge voltage. It includes battery reverse protection at the output, a charge status indicator, automatic recharge, and low-power shutdown/standby modes.

KeyParameters.**Programmable Charge Current**: Up to 500mA (Typical, set via external resistor RPROG)

Functions.FunctionDescription: Charging current output to the battery.
Input supply from adapter or USB.
Sets charge current via resistor to GND; also used for monitoring and shutdown.
